name: Gold Credit Cards
description: Card can be issued with in-kind warranty or personal guarantee
full_text:
Gold Credit Cards


--- Benefits ---

• Card can be issued with in-kind warranty or personal guarantee
• Card usage in both local and international purchase transactions and cash withdrawals in addition to payment in Egyptian pound.
• The ability to use 100% of the card credit limit in cash withdrawals.
• Possibility of issuing a number of supplementary cards.
• The ability to use the card over the internet.
• Enjoy the longest grace period up to 56 days.
• Offers you the lowest payment limit with 5% of the monthly usages.
• Card transactions can be paid through :
• Any of Banque Misr cash deposit ATMs
• Card transactions can be paid at any of the BM branches available all over Egypt, and can be paid any day all over the 24 hrs. at any of BM branches located in Airports and Hotels
• Internet banking
• Offers you promotions and discounts in the fanciest shopping centers inside and outside Egypt, which are specified in the following applications: -
• Priceless Specials application for MasterCard Credit Cards
• Use your Visa Card and get a 11% discount on Gettransfer.com
• Free SMS service after each card transaction in addition to issuing a monthly transactions statement showing the debit value and minimum payment limit as well as credit card issuance or renewal.
• Installment payment for card purchase transactions and cash withdrawals up to 36 months with special interest rate.
• Purchasing using Contactless technology to make your shopping safe, fast and easy
• Enjoy interest-free installments up to 60 months for purchases at many merchants Rewards Program: Earn 2 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally. Enjoy 10,000 welcome points upon spending 1,000 EGP within 3 months from the issuing date. Earned points can be redeemed through various ways: Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets. Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance. Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card. For more information please visit: Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club To be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms and conditions applied. Usage limits


--- Rewards Program ---

• Earn 2 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally.
• Enjoy 10,000 welcome points upon spending 1,000 EGP within 3 months from the issuing date.
• Earned points can be redeemed through various ways: Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets. Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance. Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets.
• Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance.
• Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• For more information please visit: Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club


--- Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club ---

• To be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms and conditions applied.


--- Usage limits ---

limits | Details
Limit of Online Purchasing Inside Egypt | Within the card credit limits with Maximum 400000 EGP per Month with a limit of 12 times daily
Limit of Online Purchasing Outside Egypt (In case the customer has not informed the bank of the travel) (within the monthly purchase limit outside Egypt) | 40,000EGP Monthly with a limit of 8 times daily
Contactless purchase limit without pin inside Egypt | 600 EGP per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive transaction
Contactless purchase limit without pin outside Egypt | Equivalent to 50 USD per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive Transaction
Local purchase transactions | Within the card credit limits
International purchase transactions (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) ( E-commerce – POS ) | 100,000 EGP Monthly
International monthly purchase limit (in case the customer hasn’t informed the bank of the travel) | 40,000 EGP Monthly
Local cash withdrawals (ATM) | EGP 30000 Daily
P.O.S cash withdrawal from BM Branches | With max limit 250000 Daily
International cash withdrawals (ATM & POS) (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) | 3000 EGP Monthly


--- Credit Limit ---

• Enjoy credit limit starting from EGP 3000 up to less than EGP 10000


--- Fees and charges ---

Fees and charges | Details
Issuance | EGP 250
Renewal | EGP 250
Supplementary cards issuance and renewal | EGP 150
Reissuance of are placement for lost or damaged cards | EGP100
Cash withdrawals through BM ATMs and P.O.S and other banks’ machines within Egypt | 2% of the amount withdrawn with minimum EGP15
Inquiry about the available balance via BM ATMs | Free
Inquiry about the available balance via Other banks’ ATMs inside Egypt | EGP 1 per transaction
Inquiry about the available balance via ATMs outside Egypt | EGP 3 per transaction
Interest rate | 4% monthly
Penalty for delay | EGP 75
Exceeding credit limit | EGP 75
Cash withdrawals outside Egypt | 3% of the transaction’s value + EGP 50 per transaction
Commission for transactions outside Egypt (cash withdrawals – purchases) | 3% of the transaction’s value
Disputing on any transaction through (Fax, Email or Call Centre) and it is proven that the customer is not entitled to dispute on such transaction | EGP 50
Printing certified transactions statement starting from the following month | EGP 20
Requesting clearance letter, certificate of indebtedness or to whom it may concern letter | EGP 50
Upgraded credit cards fees | 50% of the issuance fees (first three years)


--- Purchases and Cash Withdrawals Installments ---

In case the customer wishes to pay-on installment for a processed transaction, then the following procedures shall be applied:

• Cash withdrawal transaction is carried out through credit card according to the card available balance.
• During the performance of cash withdrawal transaction BM call center will be contacted in order to request the installment of transaction.
• Early repayment fees of 4% are applied in case the customer has paid the value of his installment.
• Cash withdrawal charges calculated on the customer’s credit card and related to the amount requested to be paid-on installment will be refunded.

Tenor | Interest Rate on Purchases and Cash Withdrawals:
3 | 2.81%
6 | 2.77%
9 | 2.76%
12 | 2.73%
18 | 2.67%
24 | 2.63%
36 | 2.56%
